# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 28 — Additional Child Tax Credit (Refundable ACTC) from Schedule 8812 line 27

> Tax year 2025. Last re-authored 2026-06-14.

---

## 1. Outputs

| Output field | Java model | Form 1040 destination |
|---|---|---|
| `Payments.additionalChildTaxCredit` | `Schedule8812.line27ActcCredit` | **Line 28** (refundable ACTC) |
| `TaxAndCredits.childTaxCredit` | `Schedule8812.line14CtcOdcCredit` | Line 19 (nonrefundable CTC + ODC) — co-output |

★ **INSEPARABLE from line 19** — both outputs are produced by a single `computeSchedule8812()` call. The line 28 computation cannot be separated from the line 19 computation.

### Full Schedule8812 output fields

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `line3Magi` | Modified AGI (AGI + Form 2555 + Form 4563 + Puerto Rico add-backs) |
| `line4NumQualifyingChildren` | Count of CTC-eligible dependents (Form 1040 dependents-section "CTC" box) |
| `line5CtcPotential` | **$2,200** × numCtcChildren (OBBBA 2025) |
| `line6NumOtherDependents` | Count of ODC-eligible dependents |
| `line7OdcPotential` | $500 × numOdcDependents |
| `line8TotalPotential` | line5 + line7 |
| `line9ThresholdAmount` | Phaseout threshold: $400,000 MFJ / $200,000 others — PDF field `f1_9[0]` |
| `line10PhaseOutExcess` | Raw MAGI excess over threshold (display) |
| `line11PhaseOutReduction` | $50 × ceil(excess / $1,000) |
| `line12CreditAfterPhaseOut` | line8 − line11 |
| `line13CreditLimitWorksheetA` | CLW-A result |
| `line14CtcOdcCredit` | Nonrefundable CTC+ODC → Form 1040 line 19 |
| `electsNoActc` | True if taxpayer elected ACTC opt-out |
| `line16aExcessCreditOverTax` | max(0, line12 − line14) |
| `line16bActcCeiling` | **$1,700** × numCtcChildren |
| `line17ActcPotential` | min(line16a, line16b) |
| `line18aEarnedIncome` | Form 1040 line 1z + line 1i |
| `line18bCombatPay` | Combat pay component (line 1i) |
| `line19EarnedIncomeOverFloor` | max(0, line18a − $2,500) |
| `line20EarnedIncomeActc` | 15% × line19 |
| `line21WithheldPayrollTaxes` | Part II-B: SS withheld W-2 box 4 (both spouses on MFJ; SSN-filtered otherwise) |
| `line22OtherTaxes` | Part II-B: Schedule 2 lines 5 + 6 + 13 |
| `line23TaxesTotal` | line21 + line22 |
| `line24RefundableCredits` | `earlyPayments.earnedIncomeCredit` (27a) + `earlyPayments.americanOpportunityCredit` (29) |
| `line25ExcessPayroll` | max(0, line23 − line24) |
| `line26AlternativeActcBase` | max(line20, line25) |
| `line27ActcCredit` | Final ACTC → Form 1040 line 28 |
| `creditLimitWorksheetBLine14` | CLW-B line 14 substitute when applicable (consumed by `applyAdoptionCredit`) |

---

## 2. Inputs

### 2a. Upstream computed Form 1040 fields (must exist before `computeSchedule8812` runs)

| Field | Source | Used in |
|---|---|---|
| `form1040.adjustments.line11bAmountFromLine11aAdjustedGrossIncome` | `computeAgi()` | MAGI base (Part I line 3) |
| `form1040.taxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | `computeLine16()` + line 17 + line 18 | CLW-A wA_1 |
| `form1040.income.totalWages` (line 1z) | `computeWageIncome()` | Part II-A line 18a |
| `form1040.income.nontaxableCombatPayElection` (line 1i) | `computeCombatPay()` | Part II-A line 18a (single source of truth) |
| `earlyPayments.earnedIncomeCredit` (line 27a) | `computeLine27aEIC()` (pre-set at line 1766) | Part II-B line 24 |
| `earlyPayments.americanOpportunityCredit` (line 29) | `computeForm8863()` then pre-set at line 1774 | Part II-B line 24 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.foreignTaxCredit` (line 1) | `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_2 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.childDependentCareCredit` (line 2) | `applyForm2441ToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_3 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.educationCredits` (line 3) | `applyForm8863ToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_4 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.retirementSavingsContributionsCredit` (line 4) | `applyForm8880ToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_5 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.residentialCleanEnergyCredit` (line 5a) | `applyForm5695ToSchedule3()` | CLW-A (also referenced in CLW-B by line 30) |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.energyEfficientHomeImprovementCredit` (line 5b) | `applyForm5695ToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_6 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.elderlyDisabledCredit` (line 6d) | `applyScheduleRToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_7 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.cleanVehicleCredit` (line 6f) | `applyCleanCarCreditToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_8 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.creditPreviouslyOwnedCleanVehicles` (line 6m) | `applyCleanCarCreditToSchedule3()` | CLW-A wA_9 |
| `schedule2.otherTaxes.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareTaxOnWages` (Sched 2 line 5) | `buildSchedule2()` | Part II-B line 22 |
| `schedule2.otherTaxes.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareRrtaTax` (Sched 2 line 6) | `buildSchedule2()` | Part II-B line 22 |
| `schedule2.otherTaxes.additionalMedicareTax` (Sched 2 line 13) | `buildForm8959()` | Part II-B line 22 |

### 2b. Statement inputs

| Statement | Field | Use |
|---|---|---|
| W-2 | `socialSecurityTaxWithheldAmount` (box 4) | Part II-B line 21 |

### 2c. Personal form inputs

| Form ID | Field | Use |
|---|---|---|
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer` | `electsNoActc` | ACTC opt-out — short-circuits `line27 = 0` and the wiring site does not call `setAdditionalChildTaxCredit` |
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer` | `ctcPreviouslyDenied` | Form 8862 gate trigger |
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer` | `isBonafidePuertoRicoResident` | **G11 closure 2026-04-20** — bypasses 3-child Part II-B gate |
| `form8862` | `claimsCTC` | Form 8862 Part III gate |
| `form8862` | `ctcEligible` | Form 8862 Part III result |
| `you` / `identification-taxpayer` | `ssn` | G9 ITIN check (leading-9 ⇒ ITIN) |
| `spouse` / `identification-spouse` | `ssn` (via `spouseSsn`) | G9 MFJ ITIN check — BOTH spouses ITIN ⇒ blocked (looser than EIC's "either" gate) |
| `filing-status` | `filingStatus` | Phaseout threshold ($400k MFJ / $200k other); MFS spouse-form 2555 null-shadow |

### 2d. Dependent data

| Source | Field | Use |
|---|---|---|
| `DependentRecord.qualifiesForCTC()` | computed from DOB / SSN / relationship / residency | Drives `numCtcChildren` (Part I line 4) |
| `DependentRecord.qualifiesForODC()` | computed from same | Drives `numOdcDependents` (Part I line 6) |

### 2e. Form 2555 (blocks ACTC)

| Form | Field | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `form2555Taxpayer` | not-null check + `foreignEarnedIncomeExclusion` + `housingExclusionAmount` | MAGI add-back; ACTC blocked when either Form 2555 exists |
| `form2555Spouse` | same | Same — except null-shadowed on MFS (19 #1 closure 2026-05-14) so a spouse's foreign exclusion cannot block a taxpayer's MFS return |

---

## 3. Compute Order

```
computeAgi()                                # line 11b for MAGI (Part I line 3)
computeLine16()/17/18                        # totalTaxBeforeCredits for CLW-A wA_1
applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()           # CLW-A wA_2
applyForm2441ToSchedule3()                   # CLW-A wA_3
applyForm8863ToSchedule3()                   # CLW-A wA_4 (nonrefundable education credits)
applyForm8880ToSchedule3()                   # CLW-A wA_5
applyForm5695ToSchedule3()                   # CLW-A wA_6 (5b)
applyScheduleRToSchedule3()                  # CLW-A wA_7 (6d)
applyCleanCarCreditToSchedule3()             # CLW-A wA_8 (6f) + wA_9 (6m)
computeForm8862()                            # CTC gate when ctcPreviouslyDenied
computeForm8863()                            # produces refundable AOTC; pre-set into earlyPayments at line 1774
computeLine27aEIC() (pre-set)                # earlyPayments.earnedIncomeCredit at line 1766
computeSchedule8812()                        # ★ consumes all above; produces line 14 + line 27
computeLine31ThroughLine38()                 # idempotent EIC overwrite; sets final line 28 / 32 / 33
```

### Wiring sites

| Site | Location | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| MFS null-shadow on `form2555Spouse` | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:1777-1811` | Prevents spouse's foreign exclusion from blocking taxpayer's separate-return ACTC |
| Schedule 8812 helper call | `line 1817` | Single call produces both line 14 and line 27 |
| Line 19 setter (unconditional) | `line 1881-1884` | `taxAndCredits.setChildTaxCredit(line14)` — set even when 0 |
| **Line 28 setter (null-when-zero)** | `line 1885-1894` | `payments.setAdditionalChildTaxCredit(line27)` ONLY when `actc > 0` |

---

## 4. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | What it reads |
|---|---|
| `form1040.line19` (Tax and Credits) | `TaxAndCredits.childTaxCredit` = `line14CtcOdcCredit` |
| `form1040.line28` (Payments) | `Payments.additionalChildTaxCredit` = `line27ActcCredit` |
| `form1040.line32` (other payments subtotal) | 2nd addend of `27a + 28 + 29 + 30 + 31` |
| `form1040.line33` (total payments) | `line25d + line26 + line32` |
| `applyAdoptionCredit()` CLW-B | `schedule8812.creditLimitWorksheetBLine14` substituted for line 19 when non-null (G7 partial closure for line 30) |
| PDF export — Form 1040 | `line28_additional_child_tax_credit`; `unmapped_c2_14_0` (opt-out checkbox); per-dependent `child_tax_credit` / `credit_for_other_dependents` boxes |
| PDF export — Schedule 8812 | all `Schedule8812` fields including `line9ThresholdAmount`, `line11PhaseOutReduction`, etc. |

---

## 5. 2025 Constants (OBBBA-Adjusted)

| Constant | 2025 value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| CTC per qualifying child | **$2,200** | OBBBA Act of July 2025; Rev. Proc. 2024-40 §3.08 |
| ODC per other dependent | $500 | IRC §24(h)(4) |
| ACTC ceiling per child | $1,700 | IRC §24(h)(5), as adjusted by OBBBA |
| Phaseout threshold — MFJ | $400,000 | OBBBA extension |
| Phaseout threshold — others | $200,000 | OBBBA extension |
| Phaseout rate | $50 / $1,000 excess (5%, ceiling-rounded) | IRC §24(b)(2) |
| Part II-A floor | $2,500 | IRC §24(d)(1)(B) |
| Part II-A rate | 15% | IRC §24(d)(1)(B) |

---

## 6. Validations / Flags

| Condition | Flag / Effect |
|---|---|
| `electsNoActc = true` | Schedule 8812 short-circuits with `line27 = 0`; line 28 not set |
| `ctcPreviouslyDenied = true` and no valid Form 8862 | `FORM_8862_CTC_REQUIRED` (blocking); line 28 = 0 |
| MFJ and BOTH spouses have ITIN (leading-9) | G9 gate; line 28 = 0 |
| Either spouse files Form 2555 | Line 28 = 0 (IRC §24(d)(5)(B)); MFS spouse-2555 is null-shadowed first |
| `numCtcChildren == 0` | line 28 = 0 (only ODC may apply on line 19) |
| MAGI ≥ full phaseout-elimination point | line 28 = 0 |
| `actc > 0` (final) | `payments.setAdditionalChildTaxCredit(actc)` |

Structural invariants:

- `line 28 ≥ 0`
- `line 28 ≤ $1,700 × numCtcChildren`
- `line 28 + line 19 ≤ line5 + line7` (total credits cannot exceed tentative)

---

## 7. PDF Field Map

### Form 1040 (f1040_field_map_semantic.csv)

| Semantic name | Value source |
|---|---|
| `line28_additional_child_tax_credit` | `form.payments?.additionalChildTaxCredit` |
| `unmapped_c2_14_0` (line 28 opt-out checkbox) | `computation?.schedule8812?.electsNoActc === true` |
| `dependent{0..2}_child_tax_credit` | `dependent.childTaxCreditEligible` |
| `dependent{0..2}_credit_for_other_dependents` | `dependent.otherDependentCreditEligible` |

### Schedule 8812 (f1040s8_field_map_semantic.csv)

| PDF field | Schedule8812 field |
|---|---|
| `f1_1[0]` / `f1_2[0]` | `header.name` / `header.ssn` |
| `f1_3[0]` | `line3Magi` |
| `f1_4[0]` | `line4NumQualifyingChildren` |
| `f1_5[0]` | `line5CtcPotential` |
| `f1_6[0]` | `line6NumOtherDependents` |
| `f1_7[0]` | `line7OdcPotential` |
| `f1_8[0]` | `line8TotalPotential` |
| `f1_9[0]` | `line9ThresholdAmount` (added 2026-04-20) |
| `f1_10[0]` | `line10PhaseOutExcess` |
| `f1_11[0]` | `line11PhaseOutReduction` |
| `f1_12[0]` | `line12CreditAfterPhaseOut` |
| `f1_13[0]` | `line13CreditLimitWorksheetA` |
| `f1_14[0]` | `line14CtcOdcCredit` |
| `f1_15[0]` | `line16aExcessCreditOverTax` |
| `f1_16[0]` | `line16bActcCeiling` |
| `f1_17[0]` | `line17ActcPotential` |
| `f1_18[0]` | `line18aEarnedIncome` |
| `f1_19[0]` | `line19EarnedIncomeOverFloor` |
| `f2_1[0]` | `line20EarnedIncomeActc` |
| `f2_2[0]` | `line21WithheldPayrollTaxes` |
| `f2_3[0]` | `line27ActcCredit` |

> Schedule 8812 lines 22–26 (Part II-B intermediate) have no AcroForm fields in the IRS `f1040s8` PDF template; values exist in the Java model but cannot be filled without template regeneration.

---

## 8. Co-Output Convention

| Output | Convention |
|---|---|
| Line 19 (nonrefundable CTC+ODC) | Set **unconditionally** even when 0 via `taxAndCredits.setChildTaxCredit` |
| Line 28 (refundable ACTC) | **Null-when-zero** — `payments.setAdditionalChildTaxCredit` only when `actc > 0` |

The intentional asymmetry is documented at `line 1850-1860`.

---

## 9. Gaps Summary

| ID | Severity | Description | Status | Date |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| G6 | MEDIUM | CLW-A missing Sched 3 lines 5b / 6f / 6m | Fixed | 2026-04-20 |
| G9 | MEDIUM | MFJ ITIN over-blocking (was blocking on any ITIN); now blocks only when BOTH spouses have ITINs | Fixed | 2026-04-20 |
| G10 | MEDIUM | CTC per-child constant: $2,000 vs. OBBBA-updated $2,200 | Fixed | 2026-05-14 (set to $2,200 with OBBBA citation; drift surfaced at 28 #4) |
| G11 | LOW | Puerto Rico bona fide residents bypass 3-child Part II-B gate | Fixed | 2026-04-20 |
| G3 | LOW | Part II-B line 22 missing Schedule 2 line 4 (SE tax) | Deferred OOS | — (SE is out of scope) |
| 19 #1 | — | MFS spouse-form 2555 null-shadow so foreign exclusion can't block taxpayer's separate-return ACTC | Fixed | 2026-05-14 |

---

## 10. YAML Intake Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `C:\us-tax\yamls\28-ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer.yaml` | CTC/ACTC screening (`electsNoActc`, `ctcPreviouslyDenied`, `isBonafidePuertoRicoResident`) |
| Per-dependent CTC/ODC eligibility flags | Dependents section of `personal-taxpayer` (DependentRecord) |
| `form8862` intake | CTC Part III gate fields |

---

## 11. Forms Checklist

| Form | Cardinality | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| Form 1040 | 1 | line 28 lives here |
| Schedule 8812 | 0 or 1 | line 27 of Schedule 8812 is line 28 |
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer` | 0 or 1 | Opt-out + Form 8862 gate + Puerto Rico flag |
| Form 8862 | 0 or 1 | Required when `ctcPreviouslyDenied = true` |
| Form 2555 (taxpayer / spouse) | 0 to 2 | Either present ⇒ ACTC blocked (MFS spouse-2555 null-shadowed) |
| Dependents (Form 1040 header) | 0..N | Drives `numCtcChildren` (Part I line 4) and `numOdcDependents` (line 6); CTC/ODC boxes are mutually exclusive per dependent (19 #5 sub-2 closure) |
